author: GOODJINC
description: Keep Obsidian running in the Windows tray and provide quick note/search actions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: GOODJINC
manifest.description: Keep your workspace running in the Windows tray with quick note and search actions.
manifest.name: Quick Tray

name: Quick Tray

releases.author: GOODJINC
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fix automated plugin review issues.
- Update minimum app version to 1.8.7.
- Remove unsupported manifest description wording.
- Improve settings headings and CSS compatibility.
- Clean up TypeScript warnings.

releases.author: GOODJINC
releases.description:
## Quick Tray 1.0.1

### Changes
- Updated fallback tray icon
- Improved tray icon behavior to use the current Obsidian app icon when available
- Updated README documentation

### Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into:

`VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/quick-tray/`

releases.author: GOODJINC
releases.description:
## Quick Tray v1.0.0

Initial stable release.

### Features
- Keep Obsidian running in the system tray
- Hide Obsidian to tray on close
- Tray menu for quick note, quick search, open/hide, restart, and quit
- Configurable tray icon left-click action
- Quick note window with configurable folder and filename pattern
- Quick search mode: Search or Quick Switcher
- Global shortcuts
- English UI by default, Korean UI when Obsidian language is Korean

### Release files
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into:

VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/quick-tray/
